requirements.summary: Update ContactFooter component with placeholder-ready contact details including address, phone number, and email address
acceptanceCriteria: The ContactFooter component displays updated contact details including an address, phone number, and email address.
All contact fields are clearly labeled and visible in the contact info panel.
No outdated or placeholder contact values remain from the previous implementation.
The visual styling and layout of the ContactFooter remain consistent with the existing dark charcoal and amber theme.

file_operations.description: Replace existing hardcoded contact details in the contact info panel with updated, realistic-looking placeholder values for address, phone number, and email address. Ensure all contact fields are clearly labeled with descriptive text (e.g., 'Address:', 'Phone:', 'Email:') and maintain the existing dark charcoal and amber visual theme. Preserve the current component structure, form functionality, social links, and site navigation links without modification.
